issues.description: Condition should check 'HasCardOnBoard' with cardType DON, not 'HasAttachedDon'. 'HasAttachedDon' checks attached DON on Leader; text requires DON cards anywhere on field.

Condition logic is inverted. Text says 'If you have 9 or less DON!! cards' (≤9), but 'HasAttachedDon' with count:9 checks for exactly 9 or more attached to Leader. Should use field-wide count check with ≤9 operator.
Trigger should be 'Activated' only once per turn during DON Phase setup, not repeated. Current structure may trigger multiple times.
Debuff of −2000 power should likely be 'Permanent' (ongoing penalty while ≤9 DON exist), not 'EndOfTurn'. Clarification needed from official text, but power penalty typically persists.
